name: The Backrooms Experiment
short_description: The Backrooms Experiment is a co-op walking simulator with horror and thriller elements. Find your way in Backrooms, avoid the entities, cheese entities with voices, explore the levels, cooperate with your friends, and most importantly, do not die.
detailed_description:
The Backrooms Experiment

The Backrooms Experiment is a co-op walking simulator with horror and thriller elements. Find your way in barren levels of Backrooms, every level is unique with different enviroments, difficulties and gameplay mechanics. But remember, you are not alone in The Backrooms!

Enemies

There is Skinstealers, Partygoers and Smilers wandering the levels(and some surprise entities).

Bacteria

This tall black creature is lurking around level 0, if you hear heavy footsteps, just run as fast as you can.

Skinstealers

Entities that use other peoples skins as camuflages and mimic them to lure you into their trap.

Partygoers

These entities are too smart, fast and dangerous. But they are tiring too fast, you cant outrun them if they are too close, but if they cant catch you for a few seconds, they will just give up.

Smiler

These guys are smiling, and chasing you. Yeah, too scary.

Hounds

This dog like creatures are vulnerable to flashlights.

Multiplayer

Cooperate with your friends, explore the levels and use your whistle to find your friends if they lost, but be carefull, entities hear that too!
